name: Broccoli Salad
directions: Combine salad ingredients in medium size bowl.
Whisk dressing ingredients together.
Pour over salad & mix well.
Marinate in covered container for 5- 6 hours or overnight.
Keeps for 2- 3 days.

similar.name: Fresh Vegetables with an Herbed Garlic Dip

name: Fresh Vegetables with an Herbed Garlic Dip
directions: Peel and mince the garlic.
Mince the onion and measure so you have about 3 tablespoons.
Chop the parsley and have about ¾ cup.
In a blender or food processor, mix all ingredients except mayonnaise and vegetables.
Stir in mayonnaise and chill dip until ready to serve.
Serve with crisp, fresh vegetables.

name: De-Lightful Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta till done.
Rinse well under cold water.
Drain completely.
In a large bowl add well drained pasta and all vegetables.
Mix all dressing ingredients in a medium bowl.
Pour dressing over pasta and vegetables and mix gently until combined.
Salt and pepper to taste.
Chill till serving.
*This recipe is easily doubled.

name: Sweet Tomato Cucumber Salad
directions: Thinly slice vegetables into large bowl.
Mix together oil, sugar and vinegar aqnd pour over vegetables.

similar.name: Fresh Vegetables with an Herbed Garlic Dip

name: Salmon Broccoli Pasta
directions: Boil water in a large pot (cook broccoli then use same water to cook pasta to save time). Pull the broccoli apart into small trees.  Cook broccoli for about 5 minutes and take out and drain and run under cold water.
Keep the pot of water on and boiling then add salt and cook pasta according to package directions; drain and drizzle a little olive oil to keep from clumping, set aside.
Melt the butter and add the olive oil using low heat in a large sauce pan (or use the same pot to reduce dishes).
Saute garlic and cook for about 4 minutes, add in half and half, a little salt, and cook just until half and half is heated up.
Add the broccoli, salmon, and pasta, let that soak up the sauce.
Next add the ricotta cheese and mix it inches  Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add chives if desired.
Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and serve.

name: Pasta E. Pisella Soup
directions: Cook the pasta and drain.
In a saucepan heat oil and add garlic until golden about 5 minutes.
Add chicken broth, basil and tomatoes with their juice and 1/2 cup water heat to boiling simmer for 5 minutes.
Add peas and pasta and heat through.
Serve with grated Parmesan on top.
Serve with Garlic Bread if desired.

name: "pasguetti" a La Tomasil
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions.  Meanwhile, in a large skillet, saute minced garlic in olive oil over medium heat until slightly yellow.  Add cherry tomatoes and saute 2 minutes.  Season with salt and pepper, and remove from heat.

Drain pasta, reserving 1/2 cup of cooking liquid.  Toss past with cherry tomatoes, garlic and half the basil.  Add reserved cooking liquid to skillet and toss pasta again.  Top with grated parmesan cheese and remaining basil.

name: Fettuccine Primavera
directions: HEAT water in medium saucepan to boiling. Add broccoli, carrots and bell pepper. Reduce heat to low; cook 5 to 7 minutes. Drain; set aside.

MELT butter in same saucepan over medium heat; stir in flour. Gradually add evaporated milk and chicken broth. Cook, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Stir in Parmesan cheese, provolone cheese, cayenne and black pepper until cheese is melted. Toss with pasta. Add vegetables; stir to coat. Serve immediately.
NOTE: May substitute 1 pound frozen vegetables, cooked according to package directions, for fresh vegetables.

name: Fettuccine With Fresh Vegetables
directions: Prepare pasta according to package directions.
Meanwhile, heat oil in large skillet over medium heat; add vegetables and Mrs. Dash. Cook and stir until tender-about 8 minutes.
Toss together hot pasta, vegetables and lemon juice. Mix in cheese and serve.

name: Cheesy Broccoli
directions: Peel and mince garlic.
Heat oil in skillet, and saute garlic and broccoli for 5 minutes, stirring.
Add broth, basil, cheeses, and pepper. Stir together over low heat for about 2 minutes.
Toss with 1 pound cooked pasta or rice.

name: Creamy Vegetables
directions: Mix together and bake till vegetables are tender.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Fresh Vegetables with an Herbed Garlic Dip

name: Fettucini and Spinach
directions: In large skillet, cook spinach and garlic in oil 5 minutes, stirring frequently. Dissolve bouillonin water. Add bouillon mixture, basil, cottage cheese and salt to spinach. Stir over low heat until blended. Toss spinach mixture, grated cheese and noodles.
Serve in heated dish, garnished with parsley. Refrigerate leftovers.

name: Lowfat Pasta Alfredo
directions: Wash vegetables. Cut yellow pepper into strips, tomatoes into 8 wedges each, and separate broccoli florets into bite-size pieces. Saute in olive oil until tender, but still crisp.
Cook pasta according to package directions for al dente; drain and keep hot. Stir yogurt, cheeses, and white pepper into vegetables. Toss with hot pasta. Serve immediately.

name: Spaghetti With Cottage Cheese Pesto
directions: For pesto, in a blender container or food processor bowl combine spinach, water, cottage cheese, basil, parmesan cheese, oil and garlic.
Cover and blend or process until smooth.
Spoon half of the pesto (about 1/2 cup) over the hot pasta. Toss to mix well. Serve immediately.
